spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1180 They're trying to say the leakers exaggerated, when everything really happened exactly as we described. Zoro and Sanji were easily blocked and briefly taken out. They can be glad I didn'
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1180 They're trying to say the leakers exaggerated, when everything really happened exactly as we described. Zoro and Sanji were easily blocked and briefly taken out. They can be glad I didn't mention that the attack Hajrudin's took from Imu, looked stronger than what Zoro tanked, or that Imu used Advanced CoC+kick against Sanji. Otherwise they would get ripped apart without the raw panels when the spoilers dropped two days ago. From now on, no mercy anymore😤 #FEARIMU

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 The fact that Gaban specifically compares the Haki feat from God Valley with that of Imu in this chapter, and not something else (for example, Harald CoC), shows that the Haki Gaban felt in God Valley was the strongest he had ever seen before....

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Luffy should be also back in next chapter, fighting together with Loki against Imu. Meanwhile, powered up Sommers and Kilingham vs nerfed Zoro and Sanji is also given here. Gonna be inte
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Luffy should be also back in next chapter, fighting together with Loki against Imu. Meanwhile, powered up Sommers and Kilingham vs nerfed Zoro and Sanji is also given here. Gonna be interesting what Oda else plans for this arc.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 -IMU AND LOKI'S CONVERSATION AT THE END OF THE CHAPTER- (After Imu's attack on Sanji, Loki arrives at the scene) Loki: HEY! What’s your business here in Elbaph?! Imu: I am searching for
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 -IMU AND LOKI'S CONVERSATION AT THE END OF THE CHAPTER- (After Imu's attack on Sanji, Loki arrives at the scene) Loki: HEY! What’s your business here in Elbaph?! Imu: I am searching for the culprit… the one who murdered my servant, Harald, 14 years ago… Loki: He’s not your servant! Harald is my father—and the king of Elbaph! And the one you’re looking for… is ME!!! Imu: I see… If you hadn’t been there, a lot of trouble would have been avoided… Loki: The place where I stand in this world… is Elbaph! Remember that, FOOL*! (TL NOTE: Loki called Imu "タコ" -"TAKO,” which literally means “octopus,” but its a Japanese colloquial term meaning “fool” or “idiot.”) End Note: Confrontation! NO BREAK NEXT WEEK

items.title: #ONEPIECE1180 -IMU AND LOKI'S CONVERSATION AT THE END OF THE CHAPTER- (After Imu's attack on Sanji, Loki arrives at the scene) Loki: HEY! What’s your business here in Elbaph?! Imu: I am searching for
items.text: #ONEPIECE1180 -IMU AND LOKI'S CONVERSATION AT THE END OF THE CHAPTER- (After Imu's attack on Sanji, Loki arrives at the scene) Loki: HEY! What’s your business here in Elbaph?! Imu: I am searching for the culprit… the one who murdered my servant, Harald, 14 years ago… Loki: He’s not your servant! Harald is my father—and the king of Elbaph! And the one you’re looking for… is ME!!! Imu: I see… If you hadn’t been there, a lot of trouble would have been avoided… Loki: The place where I stand in this world… is Elbaph! Remember that, FOOL*! (TL NOTE: Loki called Imu "タコ" -"TAKO,” which literally means “octopus,” but its a Japanese colloquial term meaning “fool” or “idiot.”) End Note: Confrontation! NO BREAK NEXT WEEK
